languages.text: Вы узнаете собственный флагман, однако часть узлов отличается.
You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.
languages.original_text: Вы узнаете собственный флагман, однако часть узлов отличается.

traits.locale_text: You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.
You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.
You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.

languages.text: 你认出了自己的旗舰，不过某些部分有所不同。
languages.original_text: You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.

traits.locale_text: 你认出了自己的旗舰，不过某些部分有所不同。

languages.text: Reconoces tu propia nave insignia, aunque algunos componentes sean diferentes.
languages.original_text: You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.

traits.locale_text: Reconoces tu propia nave insignia, aunque algunos componentes sean diferentes.

languages.text: Vous reconnaissez votre propre vaisseau amiral, bien que certains composants diffèrent.
languages.original_text: You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.

traits.locale_text: Vous reconnaissez votre propre vaisseau amiral, bien que certains composants diffèrent.

languages.text: Kendi sancak geminizi tanıyorsun ancak bazı şeyler değişmiş.
languages.original_text: You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.

traits.locale_text: Kendi sancak geminizi tanıyorsun ancak bazı şeyler değişmiş.

languages.text: Du erkennst dein eigenes Flaggschiff, wobei einige seiner Komponenten anders sind.
languages.original_text: You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.

traits.locale_text: Du erkennst dein eigenes Flaggschiff, wobei einige seiner Komponenten anders sind.

languages.text: 自分の旗艦を認識しているが、一部の部品は違う。
languages.original_text: You recognise your own flagship, however some of the components are different.

traits.locale_text: 自分の旗艦を認識しているが、一部の部品は違う。
